scripts.check:be:lint: uv run ruff check ergon_core ergon_builtins ergon_cli ergon_infra tests scripts
scripts.check:be:fmt: uv run ruff format --check ergon_core ergon_builtins ergon_cli ergon_infra tests scripts
scripts.check:be:type: uv run ty check ergon_core ergon_builtins ergon_cli ergon_infra
scripts.check:be:slopcop: uv run slopcop ergon_core ergon_builtins ergon_cli ergon_infra
scripts.check:be:complexity: uv run xenon --max-absolute F --max-modules E --max-average C ergon_core ergon_builtins ergon_cli ergon_infra
scripts.check:be: pnpm run check:be:lint && pnpm run check:be:fmt && pnpm run check:be:type && pnpm run check:be:slopcop && pnpm run check:be:complexity
scripts.test:be:all: pnpm run test:be:state && pnpm run test:be:integration
scripts.check:fe: pnpm run check:fe:lint && pnpm run check:fe:type
scripts.check:fast: pnpm run check:be && pnpm run check:fe
